title: House 2 Joe ALERTS at the candy bowl — comic false alarm
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: 7yo, FAIRY-PRINCESS COSTUME — silver tiara, pink-white ombre tutu w/ crystal bodice, glittery wings, fairy wand + jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Eva: 3yo, PUMPKIN-ONESIE COSTUME — round orange pumpkin body w/ carved jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf-stem hat, tiny pumpkin treat bucket. Curly bright-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Papa: BAT COSTUME — black bat hood w/ red ears + white fang print, painted bat-wing eye paint, dark bat hoodie. Bearded.
- @Joe: fluffy cream-and-gold POMERANIAN dog in red-with-black-spots LADYBUG body costume.

Camera: static medium-wide, eye-level — matches the closing frame of clip 6, Pirate-Dad now off-frame, Papa now stepped softly into frame behind Eva.

Scene: @ep15_house2_pirate_ship — porch barrels, fishnet drape, and friendly cartoon skull-and-crossbones flag soft-blurred background. A small wooden candy-coin bowl rests on the lower porch step about a foot ahead of Joe.

0:0-0:2 — Static medium-wide. @Sara center-left, @Eva center-right, @Papa softly behind-right of Eva with his left hand resting protectively on her right shoulder, his right hand at his side holding a soft cartoon wolf-mask. @Joe standing on the lawn at the foot of the porch step in front of Eva, nose intently aimed at the candy-coin bowl on the step.

0:2-0:4 — Slow dolly push in to medium-close on @Joe's nose. @Joe's nose dips down to the bowl in an enthusiastic in-place sniff, ears perked, tail wagging fast. @Eva tilts her head softly with a comic-gasp. @Sara giggles softly.

0:4-0:6 — Cut to medium-close on @Papa and @Eva. @Papa's left hand stays gently on @Eva's right shoulder. @Papa: "Ha! Steady there, buddy."

0:6-0:8 — Slow pan down to @Joe. @Joe lifts his fluffy white face from the bowl, looks up at @Eva softly with bright eyes. @Eva, looking down at @Joe: "Not the candy, Joe. GINGER."

0:8-1:0 — Slow pull back to opening medium-wide. @Sara giggles louder. @Sara: "Joe! That's so silly!" @Joe's tail wags faster.

Lighting: warm pumpkin-orange porch glow, gentle Halloween-night ambience.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, cinematic kid-show, NOT scary.
negativePrompt: duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same, mirrored figure, second father, two Papa, identical adults, second mother, two Mama, mama visible, third child, second sister, second sara, second eva, two eva, duplicate eva, three girls, fourth child, fifth child, additional children, extra child in background, ghost figure, ghost kid, ghost children, shadow children, shadow of person, mirrored children, mirror reflection, family members in the background, strangers, crowd, group of people, other faces, background people, friends, neighbors, extra neighbors, pirate visible, pirate-dad in this clip, three arms, third arm, extra arm, extra hand, floating hand, anatomy error, scary face, frightening expression, horror lighting, scary monster, real monster, monstrous teeth, fangs, claws, scary wolf, real wolf, wolf fangs, wolf claws, papa with wolf-mask on face, papa with hair, papa not bald, papa angry, papa thundering shout, papa apoplectic, papa rage face, intense yelling, blood, red liquid, red splatter, red stain, gore, injury, scary, violent, distressing, motion lines, action lines, dust trails, speed lines, motion blur, eva with brown hair, eva with red hair, eva brunette, sara in ponytail, sara with straight hair, morphing, flickering, disfigured, distorted, extra face, unstable motion, papa standing still, papa motionless, papa idle, papa observing without acting, papa waiting passively, joe airborne, joe leaping, joe eating candy, joe biting candy, sara airborne, eva airborne, ginger visible, ginger in this clip, second dog, two joe, eva running, sara running, papa pulling eva forcefully, papa lifting eva, papa scolding, dutch angle, handheld shake, whip pan, jump cut
cameraStyle: static medium-wide opening into a slow dolly push to medium-close on Joe, one cut to medium-close on Papa and Eva, capped by a slow pan down and slow pull back
closingFrame: Front-lawn medium-wide at @ep15_house2_pirate_ship — @Sara center-left giggling with bucket at chest height; @Eva center-right looking down softly at @Joe; @Papa softly behind-right of Eva with his left hand on her right shoulder, right hand holding the cartoon wolf-mask at his side; @Joe standing at Eva's left foot, fluffy face lifted, tail mid-wag in bug costume; soft pumpkin-orange porch glow.
